A1.text: Thought echo, insertion, withdrawal, or broadcasting
A1.text_zh: 思维鸣响、插入、被夺或广播

A2.text: Delusions of control, influence, passivity, or delusional perception
A2.text_zh: 被控制、被影响妄想或被动体验或妄想性知觉

A3.text: Hallucinatory voices giving running commentary or discussing the patient
A3.text_zh: 评论性幻听或讨论患者的幻听

A4.text: Persistent delusions that are culturally inappropriate and impossible
A4.text_zh: 持续的、文化上不恰当的或完全不可能的妄想

B1.text: Persistent hallucinations in any modality with fleeting delusions
B1.text_zh: 任何形式的持续性幻觉伴浮动妄想

B2.text: Breaks or interpolations in thought resulting in incoherence or neologisms
B2.text_zh: 思维中断或联想散漫导致言语不连贯或语词新作

B3.text: Catatonic behavior (excitement, posturing, waxy flexibility, negativism, mutism, stupor)
B3.text_zh: 紧张症行为（兴奋、摆姿势、蜡样屈曲、违拗、缄默、木僵）

B4.text: Negative symptoms (marked apathy, paucity of speech, blunting of emotional responses)
B4.text_zh: 阴性症状（明显淡漠、言语贫乏、情感迟钝）

A.text: A delusion or set of related delusions other than those typical of schizophrenia
A.text_zh: 一种妄想或一组相关妄想，非精神分裂症特征性妄想

C.text: General criteria for schizophrenia are not met
C.text_zh: 不符合精神分裂症的一般标准

A.text: Sustained elevated, expansive, or irritable mood clearly different from the person's usual state
A.text_zh: 情緒持續高昂、誇大或易怒，且程度明顯異於個體平時狀態

B.text: Marked increase in activity or energy with symptoms such as talkativeness, reduced need for sleep, distractibility, or flight of ideas
B.text_zh: 活動量或精力明顯增加，伴言語增多、睡眠需求減少、注意力分散或思緒奔逸等表現

C.text: Behavior leads to impaired judgment, social or occupational dysfunction, or need for clinical supervision
C.text_zh: 行為已造成判斷力受損、社會或職業功能失調，或嚴重到需要臨床監護與介入

A.text: At least two episodes of significantly disturbed mood and activity levels
A.text_zh: 至少两次情绪和活动水平明显紊乱的发作

B1.text: Manic episode: elevated, expansive or irritable mood
B1.text_zh: 躁狂发作：情绪高涨、膨胀或易激惹

B3.text: Increased talkativeness or pressure of speech

B4.text: Flight of ideas or subjective experience of thoughts racing
B4.text_zh: 意念飘忽或思维奔逸的主观体验

C3.text_zh: 精力减退或疲乏感增加

A.text: Episode lasting at least 2 weeks
A.text_zh: 发作持续至少2周

B1.text: Depressed mood to a degree abnormal for the individual
B1.text_zh: 情绪低落达到对个体异常的程度

B2.text: Loss of interest or pleasure in activities normally pleasurable
B2.text_zh: 对通常令人愉快的活动丧失兴趣或愉悦感

B3.text_zh: 精力减退或疲乏感增加

C2.text: Unreasonable feelings of self-reproach or excessive inappropriate guilt
C2.text_zh: 无合理原因的自责或过分不恰当的内疚感

C3.text: Recurrent thoughts of death or suicide, or any suicidal behavior
C3.text_zh: 反复出现死亡或自杀的想法，或任何自杀行为

C4.text: Complaints of or evidence of diminished ability to think or concentrate
C4.text_zh: 主诉或有证据表明思考或集中注意力的能力减退

C5.text: Change in psychomotor activity, with agitation or retardation
C5.text_zh: 精神运动性活动改变，激越或迟滞

C7.text: Change in appetite with corresponding weight change
C7.text_zh: 食欲改变伴相应的体重变化

A.text: At least one previous depressive episode lasting minimum 2 weeks, separated by at least 2 months
A.text_zh: 至少有一次既往抑郁发作持续至少2周，与当前发作间隔至少2个月

B3.text_zh: 精力减退或疲乏感增加

C3.text: Thoughts of death or suicidal ideation

C4.text: Diminished ability to think or concentrate
C4.text_zh: 思考或集中注意力能力减退

C5.text_zh: 精神运动性激越或迟滞

A.text: Long-standing mood disturbance that persists for years rather than a single discrete episode
A.text_zh: 心境異常長期持續存在，通常延續數年，而非單一次明確發作

B.text: Chronic depressed mood or alternating low mood and mild elation that does not meet full criteria for severe depressive or manic episodes
B.text_zh: 長期情緒低落，或在低落與輕度高昂之間反覆波動，但不足以符合完整重鬱或躁狂發作標準

C.text: The persistent mood pattern causes continuing distress or impairment in social, academic, or occupational functioning
C.text_zh: 此種持續性的心境變化造成長期主觀痛苦，或影響社交、學業或職業功能

A1.text: Persistent depressed mood or pervasive sadness
A1.text_zh: 持续的情绪低落或普遍性悲伤

A2.text: Marked loss of interest or reduced pleasure in usual activities
A2.text_zh: 对日常活动明显失去兴趣或愉悦感减少

A3.text: Mood instability with notable swings, irritability, or affective lability
A3.text_zh: 情绪不稳定，伴明显波动、易激惹或情感不稳

A4.text: Reduced energy, fatigue, or decline in usual activity level
A4.text_zh: 精力下降、疲乏或日常活动水平下降

A5.text: Sleep disturbance such as insomnia, hypersomnia, or fragmented sleep
A5.text_zh: 睡眠障碍，如失眠、嗜睡或睡眠片段化

A6.text: Symptoms cause noticeable impairment in social, school, or occupational functioning
A6.text_zh: 症状导致社交、学习或职业功能明显受损

A.text: Marked and consistently manifested fear or avoidance of specific situations or objects
A.text_zh: 对特定情境或物体有显著且持续的恐惧或回避

B.text: Anxiety symptoms in the feared situation
B.text_zh: 在恐惧情境中出现焦虑症状

C1.text_zh: 自主神经症状（心悸、出汗、震颤）

C3.text: Significant emotional distress due to symptoms or avoidance
C3.text_zh: 因症状或回避行为导致显著的情绪痛苦

A.text: Recurrent unexpected panic attacks not restricted to known situations
A.text_zh: 反复出现的非预期性惊恐发作，不限于已知情境

B1.text: Discrete episode of intense fear or discomfort starting abruptly
B1.text_zh: 突然发作的强烈恐惧或不适的离散发作

B2.text: Autonomic arousal symptoms (palpitations, sweating, trembling, dry mouth)
B2.text_zh: 自主神经兴奋症状（心悸、出汗、震颤、口干）

B3.text: Chest or abdominal symptoms (difficulty breathing, choking, chest pain, nausea)
B3.text_zh: 胸部或腹部症状（呼吸困难、窒息感、胸痛、恶心）

B4.text: Mental symptoms (dizziness, derealization, fear of losing control, fear of dying)
B4.text_zh: 精神症状（头晕、现实解体、害怕失控、害怕死亡）

A.text: Period of at least 6 months with prominent tension, worry, and apprehension about everyday events
A.text_zh: 至少6个月期间有显著的紧张、担忧和对日常事件的忧虑

B1.text: Motor tension (fidgeting, tension headaches, trembling, inability to relax)
B1.text_zh: 运动性紧张（坐立不安、紧张性头痛、震颤、无法放松）

B2.text: Autonomic overactivity (sweating, tachycardia, dry mouth, epigastric discomfort)
B2.text_zh: 自主神经过度活动（出汗、心动过速、口干、上腹不适）

B3.text: Difficulty concentrating or mind going blank due to worry or anxiety
B3.text_zh: 因担忧或焦虑而难以集中注意力或头脑一片空白

B4.text: Sleep disturbance (difficulty falling or staying asleep, or restless unsatisfying sleep)
B4.text_zh: 睡眠障碍（入睡困难、睡眠维持困难或不安宁不满意的睡眠）

A.text: Obsessions or compulsions present on most days for at least 2 successive weeks
A.text_zh: 强迫思维或强迫行为在至少连续2周的大部分日子里出现

B1.text: Obsessions: recognized as own thoughts, repetitive and unpleasant
B1.text_zh: 强迫思维：被认为是自己的想法，重复且令人不快

B2.text: Compulsions: repetitive behaviors that are not inherently enjoyable
B2.text_zh: 强迫行为：重复的行为，本身并不令人愉快

C.text: Cause distress or interfere with social or individual functioning
C.text_zh: 引起痛苦或干扰社会或个人功能

A.text: Exposure to an exceptionally threatening or catastrophic event
A.text_zh: 暴露于异常威胁性或灾难性事件

B1.text: Persistent re-experiencing (flashbacks, nightmares, distress at reminders)
B1.text_zh: 持续的再体验（闪回、噩梦、在提醒时痛苦）

B2.text: Avoidance of circumstances resembling or associated with the stressor
B2.text_zh: 回避与应激源相似或相关的情境

B3.text: Inability to recall important aspects of the stressor, or persistent hyperarousal (hypervigilance, exaggerated startle, insomnia)
B3.text_zh: 无法回忆应激源的重要方面，或持续的过度觉醒（过度警觉、夸大的惊吓反应、失眠）

A.text: Onset of symptoms within 1 month of identifiable psychosocial stressor
A.text_zh: 在可确认的心理社会应激源后1个月内出现症状

B2.text: Feeling of inability to cope, plan ahead, or continue in the present situation
B2.text_zh: 感觉无法应对、无法计划未来或无法继续现状

B3.text: Some degree of disability in daily routine performance
B3.text_zh: 日常活动表现有一定程度的障碍

C.text: Does not meet criteria for another specific disorder
C.text_zh: 不符合其他特定障碍的标准

A.text: Multiple and recurrent physical symptoms with no adequate physical explanation
A.text_zh: 多种反复出现的躯体症状，无充分的躯体解释

B.text: Persistent refusal to accept medical reassurance that there is no physical cause
B.text_zh: 持续拒绝接受无躯体原因的医学保证

C1.text: Gastrointestinal symptoms (abdominal pain, nausea, bloating, diarrhea)
C1.text_zh: 胃肠道症状（腹痛、恶心、腹胀、腹泻）

C2.text_zh: 心血管症状（呼吸困难、胸痛）

C3.text: Pain symptoms (headache, limb pain, back pain, joint pain)
C3.text_zh: 疼痛症状（头痛、肢体痛、背痛、关节痛）

A.text: Persistent disturbance of eating or weight-control behavior such as restriction, binge eating, vomiting, or other compensatory behavior
A.text_zh: 持續存在異常進食或控制體重的行為，例如嚴格限制飲食、暴食、催吐或其他代償行為

B.text: Excessive concern about body weight or shape, or intense fear of gaining weight
B.text_zh: 對體重或體型過度在意，或強烈害怕發胖

C.text: Eating disturbance causes marked weight change, nutritional compromise, or clinically significant psychosocial impairment
C.text_zh: 進食異常已導致明顯體重改變、營養受損，或造成臨床顯著的心理社會功能損害

A.text: Complaint of difficulty falling or staying asleep, or poor quality of sleep
A.text_zh: 主诉入睡困难、睡眠维持困难或睡眠质量差

B.text: Sleep disturbance occurs at least 3 times per week for at least 1 month
B.text_zh: 睡眠障碍至少每周3次，持续至少1个月

C.text: Preoccupation with sleeplessness and excessive concern about its consequences
C.text_zh: 对失眠的过度关注及对其后果的过分担忧

D.text: Unsatisfactory sleep causes marked distress or interferes with functioning
D.text_zh: 不满意的睡眠引起显著的痛苦或干扰日常功能

A1.text: Emotional dysregulation with frequent intense reactions or poor self-soothing
A1.text_zh: 情绪调节困难，常出现强烈反应或难以自我安抚

A2.text: Behavioral problems such as impulsivity, oppositionality, or disruptive conduct
A2.text_zh: 存在行为问题，如冲动、对立违抗或扰乱性行为

A3.text: School, work, or daily-role dysfunction related to emotional or behavioral symptoms
A3.text_zh: 因情绪或行为症状导致学习、工作或日常角色功能受损

A4.text: Social difficulties including peer conflict, withdrawal, or poor age-appropriate interaction
A4.text_zh: 存在社交困难，包括同伴冲突、退缩或缺乏符合年龄的互动

A5.text: Reactions are developmentally inappropriate for the person's age or context
A5.text_zh: 其反应与年龄或所处情境相比显得发育上不相称

A6.text: Mixed emotional symptoms such as concurrent anxiety, low mood, or irritability
A6.text_zh: 伴混合性情绪症状，如焦虑、情绪低落或易激惹同时存在

A1.text: Patient seeks advice or consultation without clear psychiatric symptoms
A1.text_zh: 患者寻求建议或咨询，无明确精神症状

A2.text: Primary concern is psychological well-being, life adjustment, or relationship issues
A2.text_zh: 主要关切为心理健康、生活适应或人际关系问题

A3.text: No symptom pattern meeting criteria for any specific psychiatric disorder
A3.text_zh: 无符合任何特定精神障碍标准的症状模式

F41.2.name: Mixed anxiety and depressive disorder
F41.2.name_zh: 混合性焦虑与抑郁障碍

A.text: Both anxiety and depressive symptoms present
A.text_zh: 同时存在焦虑和抑郁症状

B.text: Neither severe enough to independently meet diagnostic criteria
B.text_zh: 焦虑和抑郁均未严重到独立满足各自的诊断标准

C.text_zh: 存在自主神经症状（颤抖、心悸、口干、胃部不适）

A.text: Anxiety symptoms present but insufficient for specific diagnosis
A.text_zh: 存在焦虑症状但不足以达到特定焦虑障碍的诊断标准

B1.text_zh: 运动性紧张（坐立不安、肌肉紧张、颤抖）

B2.text_zh: 自主神经过度活跃（心悸、出汗、口干）

B3.text_zh: 认知症状（担忧、恐惧、注意力难以集中）

B4.text_zh: 与焦虑相关的睡眠障碍

F43.9.name: Reaction to severe stress, unspecified
F43.9.name_zh: 未特指的严重应激反应

A.text: Identifiable stressful event or life change
A.text_zh: 可识别的应激事件或生活变化

B2.text_zh: 与应激源相关的功能损害

B3.text: Symptoms insufficient for PTSD or adjustment disorder
B3.text_zh: 症状不足以诊断PTSD或适应障碍

F45.9.name: Somatoform disorder, unspecified
F45.9.name_zh: 未特指的躯体形式障碍

A.text: Somatic complaints not explained by medical condition
A.text_zh: 无法用器质性疾病解释的躯体主诉

C3.text_zh: 心血管或呼吸系统主诉

F51.9.name: Nonorganic sleep disorder, unspecified
F51.9.name_zh: 未特指的非器质性睡眠障碍

A.text: Sleep disturbance as primary complaint
A.text_zh: 以睡眠障碍为主要主诉

B.text: Distress or daytime impairment from sleep problem
B.text_zh: 睡眠问题导致困扰或日间功能损害

D.text: No organic or substance-related cause identified
D.text_zh: 未发现器质性或物质相关原因

A.text: Persistent disturbance of sleep quantity, quality, timing, or the sleep-wake cycle as a primary complaint
A.text_zh: 以睡眠量、睡眠品質、睡眠時相或睡眠－覺醒節律的持續異常作為主要困擾

B.text: Sleep problem results in daytime sleepiness, fatigue, cognitive difficulty, or social or occupational impairment
B.text_zh: 睡眠問題導致日間嗜睡、疲倦、認知困難，或造成社會與職業功能受損

C.text: Clinical presentation suggests an organic or physiological basis and is not better explained by a nonorganic sleep disorder alone
C.text_zh: 臨床表現提示具有器質性或生理性基礎，且不能僅以非器質性睡眠障礙充分解釋

A.text: Symptoms begin in childhood and are evident across more than one setting
A.text_zh: 症狀自兒童期起病，且在家庭、學校或其他情境中均可見

B.text: Marked inattention and distractibility interfere with sustained tasks or organized activity
B.text_zh: 明顯注意力不集中且易受干擾，影響持續專注與有組織的任務表現

C.text: Excessive activity, restlessness, or impulsive behavior is inconsistent with developmental level
C.text_zh: 過度活動、坐立不安或衝動行為，與其發展年齡明顯不相稱
